profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.click_to_upload: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profile.stored_in: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{company}}.
profile.select_company_avatar: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profile.name_hint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.email_hint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

instance.title: General
instance.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.

deployment.title: Deployment and auth
deployment.local_trusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deployment.authenticated_public: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deployment.authenticated_private: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.

censor_logs.title: Censor username in logs
censor_logs.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

keyboard_shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboard_shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.

backup_retention.title: Backup retention
backup_retention.description: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.

feedback.title: AI feedback sharing
feedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedback.no_default: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
feedback.dont_allow_desc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
feedback.retest_hint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.

sign_out.title: Sign out
sign_out.description: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the Paperclip interface. Changes take effect immediately without a restart.

plugin_detail.runtime_dashboard_desc: Worker process, scheduled jobs, and webhook deliveries
plugin_detail.runtime_unavailable: Runtime diagnostics are unavailable right now.
plugin_detail.health_ready_notice: Health checks run once the plugin is ready.

heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.disable_all_confirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
heartbeats.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.environments_desc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
experimental.isolated_workspaces_desc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.auto_restart_desc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
experimental.auto_recovery_desc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
experimental.lookback_hours_invalid: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.
experimental.confirm_task_count_one: {{count}} recovery task matches the last {{hours}} hours.
experimental.confirm_task_count_other: {{count}} recovery tasks match the last {{hours}} hours.
experimental.confirm_no_tasks: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
experimental.confirm_skipped_one: {{count}} current finding is outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.
experimental.confirm_skipped_other: {{count}} current findings are outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.

access.title: Instance Access
access.description: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
access.select_user: Select a user to inspect instance access.
access.admin_required: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
access.company_access_desc: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

auth.sign_in_desc: Use your email and password to access this instance.
auth.sign_up_desc: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
auth.fill_all_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
